widgets.title: Geographic Distribution by Latitude
widgets.description: Bubble map showing count of weather observations aggregated by latitude and longitude with station city labels.
widgets.dataKey: SELECT "latitude" AS lat, "longitude" AS lon, "station_city" AS label, CAST(COUNT(*) AS DOUBLE) AS value FROM "t_weather_observations" GROUP BY lat, lon, label ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 500

widgets.title: Station City × Condition Label Heatmap
widgets.description: Heatmap showing the count of weather observations by station city and condition label.
widgets.dataKey: SELECT "station_city" AS row, "condition_label" AS col, CAST(COUNT(*) AS DOUBLE) AS value FROM "t_weather_observations" GROUP BY "station_city", "condition_label" ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 400

widgets.title: Station City Composition by Condition Label
widgets.description: Shows the count composition of weather observations by condition label for each station city.
widgets.dataKey: SELECT "station_city" AS label, "condition_label" AS "group", CAST(COUNT(*) AS DOUBLE) AS value FROM "t_weather_observations" GROUP BY label, "group" ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 25

widgets.title: Multi-Metric Profile by Station City
widgets.description: Average temperature, humidity, wind speed, and precipitation metrics grouped by station city.
widgets.dataKey: SELECT "station_city" AS "axis", CAST(AVG("temp_c") AS DOUBLE) AS "value" FROM "t_weather_observations" GROUP BY "station_city" ORDER BY "value" DESC LIMIT 12

widgets.title: Station City Composition Over Observation Date
widgets.description: Stacked area chart showing the count of weather observations per station city over time by month.
widgets.dataKey: SELECT CAST(date_trunc('month', "observation_date") AS VARCHAR) AS x, "station_city" AS series, CAST(COUNT(*) AS DOUBLE) AS value FROM "t_weather_observations" GROUP BY x, series ORDER BY x ASC, series ASC LIMIT 500
